channel.title: Robusta Coffee Monitor
channel.description: Daily model-driven read on coffee markets and Vietnamese Central Highlands growing conditions.

item.title: Coffee monitor — 2026-07-23 — late-cycle
item.description: Coffee futures closed at 311¢/lb — down 3.3% on the week and up 7.9% on the month. The regime model reads the market as late-cycle (selective posture) and has for 13 sessions. Growing conditions look unremarkable: Central Highlands rainfall is near its seasonal norm (+0.3σ). The crop is in its fruit filling window, and stage-weighted stress is low. A strengthening Brazilian real (-2.1% in a month) squeezes producer margins — supportive for prices.

item.title: Coffee monitor — 2026-07-22 — late-cycle
item.description: Coffee futures closed at 317¢/lb — down 5.3% on the week and up 14.3% on the month. The regime model reads the market as late-cycle (selective posture) and has for 12 sessions. Growing conditions look unremarkable: Central Highlands rainfall is near its seasonal norm (+0.3σ). The crop is in its fruit filling window, and stage-weighted stress is low. The Brazilian real is little changed on the month (-1.3%) — a neutral currency backdrop.

item.title: Coffee monitor — 2026-07-21 — late-cycle
item.description: Coffee futures closed at 332¢/lb — down 1.6% on the week and up 20.7% on the month. The regime model reads the market as late-cycle (selective posture) and has for 11 sessions. Growing conditions look unremarkable: Central Highlands rainfall is near its seasonal norm (+0.3σ). The crop is in its fruit filling window, and stage-weighted stress is low. The Brazilian real is little changed on the month (-0.9%) — a neutral currency backdrop.

Growing conditions look unremarkable: Central Highlands rainfall is near its seasonal norm (+0.3σ). The crop is in its fruit filling window, and stage-weighted stress is low. The Brazilian real is little changed on the month (-1.1%) — a neutral currency backdrop.

Growing conditions look unremarkable: Central Highlands rainfall is near its seasonal norm (+0.3σ). The crop is in its fruit filling window, and stage-weighted stress is low. The Brazilian real is little changed on the month (-0.2%) — a neutral currency backdrop.

Growing conditions look unremarkable: Central Highlands rainfall is near its seasonal norm (+0.3σ). The crop is in its fruit filling window, and stage-weighted stress is low. The Brazilian real is little changed on the month (-0.2%) — a neutral currency backdrop.

Growing conditions look unremarkable: Central Highlands rainfall is near its seasonal norm (+0.4σ). The crop is in its fruit filling window, and stage-weighted stress is low. The Brazilian real is little changed on the month (+0.3%) — a neutral currency backdrop.

Growing conditions look unremarkable: Central Highlands rainfall is near its seasonal norm (+0.3σ). The crop is in its fruit filling window, and stage-weighted stress is low. The Brazilian real is little changed on the month (+1.7%) — a neutral currency backdrop.

item.title: Coffee monitor — 2026-07-13 — late-cycle
item.description: Coffee futures closed at 341¢/lb — down 6.2% on the week and up 37.4% on the month. The regime model reads the market as late-cycle (selective posture) and has for 5 sessions. Growing conditions look unremarkable: Central Highlands rainfall is near its seasonal norm (+0.3σ). The crop is in its fruit filling window, and stage-weighted stress is low. The Brazilian real is little changed on the month (-0.1%) — a neutral currency backdrop.

item.title: Coffee monitor — 2026-07-10 — late-cycle
item.description: Coffee futures closed at 343¢/lb — up 8.7% on the week and up 40.3% on the month. The regime model reads the market as late-cycle (selective posture) and has for 4 sessions. Growing conditions look unremarkable: Central Highlands rainfall is near its seasonal norm (+0.2σ). The crop is in its fruit filling window, and stage-weighted stress is low. The Brazilian real is little changed on the month (-1.1%) — a neutral currency backdrop.
